message:
feat(database,websocket): add postgres cancellation and refine websocket checkpoint calls

Postgres connection: add Cx cancellation checkpoint to poll_read and
poll_write loops, matching the pattern established in the mysql driver.

WebSocket client/server/split: normalise cancellation checkpoint calls
to use the same `checkpoint().is_err()` pattern for consistency across
the I/O subsystem.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
